emotional_tone: Professional, calm, precise, information-dense, and modern (Old Money Tech fusion). Avoid generic enterprise vibes.

typography.strategy: Swiss Brutalist meets Corporate - High contrast in weight but standard in readability. Numbers must use tabular figures.

headings.description: Distinctive, authoritative, and slightly technical for headings.

body.description: Excellent for dense data, numerical tables (crucial for IDR currency), and reports.

colors.strategy: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for finance. Avoid teal green/teal blue.

layouts.strategy: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode B: High Density). Optical alignment over geometrical.
layouts.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. Summary cards span 1 col, main charts span 2-3.
layouts.forms: Two-column grid for larger forms (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2), generous p-6 or p-8 padding inside cards. Left-align inputs.
layouts.tables: Full width, dense padding (py-2 px-4) for data rows. Container must have border-collapse style layout.

components.strategy: Shadcn/UI, modified for high information density. Cardless or subtle roundness.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped or 6px radius (rounded-md), hover states must lift slightly (-translate-y-px) with subtle shadow. Explicit text color on hover.
components.cards: Max 8px radius (rounded-lg). 1px subtle border, flat background. No heavy drop shadows. Hover: shadow-sm.
components.tables: Sticky header. Zebra striping or subtle hover state (hover:bg-slate-50). IDR columns MUST be right-aligned.
components.navigation: Sidebar with active states clearly marked (bg-slate-100 or left border highlight). Header with solid background and bilingual toggle.

visual_enhancers.borders: Grid borders (Technical look) for data tables to expose the skeleton. 1px solid strokes instead of soft shadows.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Neumorphism (Tactile) variants for small action buttons. Solid clean surfaces for financial clarity (NO glassmorphism for data grids).
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - crisp and suitable for dense dashboards.

design_tokens.currency_display: Use tabular-nums in IBM Plex Sans, right-aligned. Format: Rp 10.000.000. Negative values in text-danger.
design_tokens.depreciation_timeline: Use vertical Stepper components or horizontal timelines with crisp 1px borders. For charts, use Recharts customized with no grid lines or very subtle border/40.
design_tokens.form_density: Labels: text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase text-slate-500. Inputs: h-9 (dense) with focus:ring-accent.

login_background.description: Minimalist concrete architecture. Use as a split-screen background on the Auth pages.

empty_state.description: Clean minimalist office desk with plant. Use for empty tables or 'No Data' states.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable for form containers, but keep tabular data dense.
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component is located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js.
DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.
instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Apply custom font families 'Chivo' and 'IBM Plex Sans' via Google Fonts.
For Shadcn components, override default radius to 8px max (rounded-md/lg).
DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk.
Ensure all monetary values use Indonesian format (Rp 10.000.000). Apply right alignment to all currency columns in tables.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Use Phosphor icons. Install with: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Implement Straight-Line depreciation logic strictly as: (Harga Perolehan - Nilai Sisa) / Umur Ekonomis.
Include CAPTCHA Cloudflare Turnstile placeholder slot in the Auth screens.
Bilingual toggle (ID/EN) must be present in the header.
Dashboard must include KPI cards (total assets, acquisition cost, accumulated depreciation, book value) and Recharts-based visualizations.

accessibility.contrast: APCA preferred. Minimum 4.5:1 for standard text. Never use gray-on-gray for data.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Subtle transitions (0.2s ease) on interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.
